sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91882" key="pursouri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρσουρ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
